testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.DeviceMappingChangedSseListenerTest

testcase.name: listener broadcasts MAPPING_CHANGED to every emitter for the affected device()
listener does not error when no emitters are registered()
listener does not deliver to other devices()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-3879368a-9964-43e6-9920-f9a167cdca2c totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-3879368a-9964-43e6-9920-f9a167cdca2c totalEmittersForDevice=2 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE broadcast: device=device-3879368a-9964-43e6-9920-f9a167cdca2c delivered=2/2 attempted 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.s.DeviceMappingChangedSseListener : MAPPING_CHANGED → device=device-3879368a-9964-43e6-9920-f9a167cdca2c newRestaurant=restaurant-X delivered=2 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.s.DeviceMappingChangedSseListener : MAPPING_CHANGED → device=ghost-device newRestaurant=restaurant-A delivered=0 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-target totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-other totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE broadcast: device=device-target delivered=1/1 attempted 2026-05-02T23:50:33.395+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.s.DeviceMappingChangedSseListener : MAPPING_CHANGED → device=device-target newRestaurant=restaurant-Z delivered=1
